title: Ethics of emergent rhetoric Dynamic guardrails with public ledger.
content:
Ethics of emergent rhetoric Dynamic guardrails with public ledger.
Long-term drift Periodic “language genome” snapshotting + regression checks.


⸻

🌱 5. Bloom & Evolve Algorithm (simplified)

def bloom_evolve(input_text, feedback, mode):
analysis = multi_layer_parse(input_text)
rhetorics = detect_rhetoric(analysis)
generation = generate_variant(analysis, rhetorics, mode)
score = evaluate_persuasion(generation, feedback)
if mode=="RAW":
update_weights(score)
return generation

Feedback sources: user resonance, coherence metrics, ethical audits.
